title: Bows & Crossbows to Guns!
description: With realistic bolt-action! Did you perhaps want to do a old fashioned ww1-like battle in Minecraft? Well now with this vanilla-styled model you can! This resource pack adds two gun models and nice reload animation (replaces all crossbows and bows).
body:
Hello there welcome to perhaps one of the oldest gun resource packs on modrinth, have fun!

Crossbow to rifle resource pack aims to give you a enjoyable experience, it does not change the sound and replaces all the crossbows and bows, no fancy renaming or similar things needed.
> See these models in the image gallery, [click me!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/crossbow-to-rifle/gallery)
- This was tested on versions 1.20.1 and 1.21.5 of Minecraft but it should work on most if not all other versions.
- The textures used are taken from [minecraft.wiki](https://minecraft.wiki/), however the model is made by me using Blockbench.

- **Bow -> Revolver!**
- **Crossbow -> Rifle!**
